top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 26 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Legal Sub Committee Meeting – 17 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Legal Sub-Committee. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Operations Sub-Committee Meeting – 18 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Operations and Legal Sub-Committees. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: European Stocks Rally to Cap Best Week Since May: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks rose as the latest round of jitters about the artificial-intelligence trade subsided, with Europe’s benchmark rising to an all-time high. The dollar touched a two-week low while gold extended gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Top official recuses herself from NHS Palantir contract decision after business links
top_signals.summary: MPs had raised concerns over Samantha Jones’s previous consulting work
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Swire Shipping Announces New Branch Office in Timor-Leste
top_signals.summary: Swire Shipping announced the establishment of a new branch office in Dili, Timor-Leste, marking a milestone in the company's investment in Southeast Asia.The new office will be led by Darry Tan, who has spent the past two years on the ground…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump doubles down on support for Venezuela’s Delcy Rodríguez
top_signals.summary: Washington is tying itself closely to a government that faces public anger over its response to devastating earthquakes

top_signals.title: SILICON Publishes Whitepaper on Maritime Welding Shortage
top_signals.summary: SILICON has published a whitepaper, "Rapid Arc Welding: Solving the Maritime Welder Shortage," which explores how automation and digital welding technologies can help shipyards reduce their dependence on scarce skilled labour while increasing…
